privileged_info_summary: The 'Big Five Personality Traits.csv' dataset is real, sourced from Dolan et al. (2009) via the JASP Data Library. It contains exactly 500 participant rows, contradicting the task description's claim of 231 participants. The dataset contains exactly five columns: 'Neuroticism', 'Extraversion', 'Openness', 'Agreeableness', and 'Conscientiousness'.
